text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MBSF Cost and Use Segment Codebook │ March 2026 │ V 1.3 7 

ANES_BENE_PMT 

LABEL: Anesthesia Beneficiary Payments 

DESCRIPTION: This variable is the sum of coinsurance and deductible payments for Part B anesthesia services (ANES) 
for a given year. The total Beneficiary payments are calculated as the sum of LINE_COINSRNC_AMT + 
LINE_BENE_PTB_DDCTBL_AMT for the relevant lines. 

ANES claim lines are a subset of the claims, and a subset
